description: [db][concurrency] Two concurrent confirmSalesOrder calls on one draft SO: exactly one succeeds; reserved_quantity equals min(available, ordered) — never doubled
[db][concurrency] Two SOs confirmed concurrently for the same serialized product cannot claim the same unit; the loser sees the unit unavailable (backorder), no silent allocated_so_line_id overwrite
[db][concurrency] Two concurrent fulfills of one line: total fulfilled never exceeds quantity_ordered and each physical unit yields at most one consume movement and one delivered status
[db][concurrency] Concurrent receiveTransfer + cancelTransfer: exactly one applies; source/destination on-hand consistent with a single application (no fabricated stock)
[db][concurrency] Concurrent duplicate receivePoLine calls cannot double-receive beyond the second call's post-lock guard; RMA transition race rejected by post-lock status assert
[db] Order 10 with 3 on hand: confirm reserves 3 (not 10), available stays >= 0, computeBackorder/suggestPoFromBackorder propose exactly 7
[db] Serialized hard-mode confirm + fulfill round-trip leaves held_quantity at 0 throughout (symmetric accounting)
[db] Manufactured reserved/held drift is repaired by reconcileStockLevels; the admin rebuild action reports the corrections it made
[db][e2e] on_fulfillment SO: fulfill 2 of 5 → invoice for 2 auto-created with correct amounts; fulfill remaining 3 → second invoice; re-invoking bills nothing (idempotent cap)
[db] Manual-mode Generate invoice bills ordered−invoiced once; created invoice items carry so_line_id backlink and the line's tax_rate_id
[db] Drop-ship confirm creates a delivered unit + linked asset, marks the line fulfilled, and leaves quantity_on_hand untouched at every location
[db] Reopen-to-draft releases allocations (reserved back to 0 / units back to in_stock) and permits line edits; reopen is rejected once any quantity is fulfilled or invoiced
[db] Multi-unit serialized fulfill with a mid-flight failure rolls back completely: no movement, no delivered unit, and no orphan asset row persists

[db][migration] New CHECKs reject negative reserved/held, zero/negative line quantities, and fulfilled/invoiced > ordered; migration pre-clamps seeded violating rows then applies cleanly and rolls back
[db] Location scoping matrix: a tech assigned to van A is denied receive/retire/dispatch/fulfill/loan against van B but allowed on van A; an unassigned warehouse is writable; manager acts anywhere
[db] Low-stock job across two managed locations + one unmanaged: exactly one notification per manager scoped to their location, none for the unmanaged one
[db][e2e] Standard RMA: return → sent_to_vendor → resolveReplacement → deployReplacement delivers the new unit and relinks the client asset (serial/MAC updated); old unit stays out of sellable stock
[db] chargeForUnreturned creates one draft invoice linked on the case; invoking twice does not duplicate the charge
[db][migration] rma_cases CHECK no longer admits 'dead_unit_returned'; existing rows and the advance-replacement happy path are unaffected
[db] receivePoLine with a cost currency differing from the product's cost_currency throws and leaves average_cost unchanged
[db] Low stock across USD and EUR products yields one PO per (vendor, currency), each with matching header/line currency and receivable end-to-end
[db] Serialized ticket-material consumption with creates_asset_on_delivery=true creates + links an asset; with the flag off it does not
[db][migration] tax_rate FK rejects an orphan tax_rate_id; soft-link FKs reject orphan references and SET NULL on parent delete; new hot-path indexes exist
[db] UPDATE and DELETE on stock_movements raise from the immutability trigger; INSERT still works
[db] Positive serialized adjust without serials is rejected; with serials it creates units carrying exactly those serials (no ADJ-* fabrication)
[ui] Double-click on Confirm dispatches exactly one action call (in-flight guard), and the fulfill dialog renders lines with remaining quantities and submits selected units

[db] PO line for a vendor with a price-list row defaults cost/currency/vendor-SKU from vendor_products; without one it falls back to average/catalog cost; partial unique index blocks a second preferred offer
[db] Low-stock suggestion prices lines from the preferred vendor's offer (cost + currency) when present
[db][e2e] Cycle count: start snapshots expected, blind entry records counts, variance computes, approval writes 'cycle_count' adjust movements, and post-approval on-hand equals counted quantities
[db] Serialized count: expected-but-unscanned unit is retired on approval; an unexpected serial blocks approval until dispositioned
[db] A stock movement at the location mid-session marks the affected count line stale; cancelling a session leaves stock untouched; counter without the cycle_count permission cannot approve
[db] Landed cost: $100 freight allocated by value across two received lines adjusts moving-average and serialized unit_cost proportionally; a second apply is a no-op
[db] Create-bill-from-PO prefills received quantities/costs; due date honors net-30 terms; variance indicator fires when bill total ≠ received value
[db] Vendor bill lifecycle draft→open→paid and void enforce valid transitions; dashboard aging buckets classify due vs overdue correctly
[db][migration] All new migrations in this plan apply up() and roll back down() cleanly in sequence on the migrated schema
